summary:
The task requires determining how well a test identifies genuinely sick patients within an affected group; this aligns precisely with measuring *sensitivity*, which indicates the fraction of actual cases identified by the test. \boxed{\text{sensitivity}} To be clear and concise for your request:

To detect truly positive persons effectively using tests, one must consider their capability at recognizing genuine cases—this corresponds exactly to testing *sensitivity*. Hence,
\[
\boxed{\text{sensitivity}}
\]
